recommendations.title: The Rezort
recommendations.overview: The ReZort, a post apocalyptic safari, offers paying guests the opportunity to kill zombies in the wake of an outbreak.

recommendations.title: Go Goa Gone
recommendations.overview: A rave party off the coast of Goa goes horrifyingly and hilariously wrong when the island is overrun with zombies.

recommendations.title: Hidden
recommendations.overview: A family takes refuge in a fallout shelter to avoid a dangerous outbreak.

recommendations.title: Lorenzo
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Horror
recommendations.overview: A cat named Lorenzo is dismayed to discover that his tail has developed a personality of its own.

recommendations.title: My Mom Is a Character
recommendations.overview: After another spat with her kids, Dona Hermínia decides to take some time off from them and hides away in her aunt's house, where she reminisces about her kids in an age when they still needed her.

recommendations.title: One Cut of the Dead
recommendations.overview: Real zombies arrive and terrorize the crew of a zombie film being shot in an abandoned warehouse, said to be the site of military experiments on humans.
